claim_ceiling: Public records are timestamped public deposits or submitted manuscripts as stated. Zenodo records are not peer-review endorsements unless explicitly stated. Runtime and intervention claims remain limited to restricted-access behavioral observability and sandbox-level validation unless independently validated.
